title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched SuperComputer, an always-on cloud platform enabling AI agents to build, deploy, and run real software in Ubuntu environments with access to databases, storage, terminals, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment. The platform closes the gap between code generation and live software execution.
